untranslatable_reason: Signal requires construction of stationary spread from weighted combinations of multiple price series using linear regression hedge ratios or Johansen cointegration eigenvectors, plus unit root testing for stationarity confirmation. These multivariate statistical techniques and spread construction methods are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators only support single-instrument technical analysis. Exact entry thresholds, lookback period, half-life, and exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading / cointegration-based mean reversion strategy that fundamentally requires: (1) multi-instrument spread construction with dynamically calculated hedge ratios, (2) cointegration/stationarity testing, (3) z-score or mean-reversion metrics on the constructed spread. None of these capabilities exist in the allowed indicator vocabulary. A simplified approximation using price vs SMA crossover has been provided as a placeholder, but it does not capture the core signal logic.
